title: Gimme That
description: QOL mod for builders. Allow easier access to certain items.
body:
# Gimme That
Utility mod for building. Allow easier access to building blocks through commands.
## Commands
- /gimmehead <type> <value>
  - Usage: Gives you a player head
  - Arguments:
    - type: Type of value provided in <value>. Accepted values are "player", "url" and "value"
    - value: Player name, skin url, or base64 value of the head


- /gimmepot <front> <right> <back> <left>
  - Usage: Gives you the decorated pot of your choice without crafting
  - Arguments:
    - front, right, back, left: Sherd for each side, supports "random" and "none"


- /gimmeplant <category>
  - Usage: Gives you a random "pottable" plant
  - Arguments:
    - category: Type of plants, supports "all", "flower", "sapling", "mushroom" and" bush"
 
- /gimmeframe <type>
  - Usage: Gives you invisible item frames
  - Arguments:
    - type: Type of item frame, supports "normal" and "glowing"

# Language
Only in config screen(will update to command feedback) and only traditional Chinese and English for now. Contact me to request another language.

# Support & Contact
If you find any bugs, need support, or have suggestions. Feel free to contact me through Discord -> jhuanglululu.
